name: Donate CTA shows after positive review @android @high-risk @1-devices
description: Verifies that the Donate CTA is shown after dismissing the positive review prompt; verifies modal strings and screenshot; and that the Donate button shows the correct Open URL modal.
descriptionHtml: Verifies that the Donate CTA is shown after dismissing the positive review prompt; verifies modal strings and screenshot; and that the Donate button shows the correct Open URL modal.
